creator: hyogeollee@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

Sorry, I found build problem with gettext at 0.0.12.

Would you try attached patch? I fixed to use gettext option.

Try this link if you cannot get attached file :

http://sites.google.com/site/hyogeollee/Home/patch_20110409.txt


Regards,
Hyogeol Lee


2011/4/8 Frederic Culot <culot@freebsd.org>:
> Hi,
>
> thanks for submitting this patch.
> However I have problems building libhangul after having applied the patch
> as shown with the following tinderbox run log:
>
> http://people.freebsd.org/~culot/tinderbox/8.2-FreeBSD/ko-libhangul-0.0.12.log
>
> Could you have a look at it please?
>
> culot@
>
